note: seq=100 SUPERSEDED -> noop. The original seq-100 (source_discovery) failed its --migrate step and rolled back; the flat cursor only advances on a healthy apply, so it was retrying forever and blocking seq-101 (research-frontier). This noop advances the cursor past 100 so frontier applies; source_discovery will be re-deployed with a fail-soft --migrate.

steps.note: seq=100 superseded; source_discovery re-deployed later with fail-soft migrate.
